QF.id: Role of RTAs in Mutual Fund Transactions_11

question.text: Which two entities are the leading RTAs in the Indian mutual fund industry?

answer.text: BSE StAR MF and NSE NMFII

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Computer Age Management Services (CAMS) and KFin Technologies (KFintech, formerly Karvy) are the two dominant RTAs servicing almost all mutual fund houses in India. Together they process the vast majority of MF transactions. **The Trap:** NSDL and CDSL are depositories, not RTAs. BSE StAR MF and NSE NMFII are exchange platforms for MF transactions. AMFI is an industry body, not an RTA. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series V-A covers the MF ecosystem; knowing the RTA duopoly helps understand industry concentration and operational dependencies. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** MF Central is the common platform built jointly by CAMS and KFintech. Direct your tech-savvy clients here for a unified view of their holdings across all AMCs regardless of which RTA services them.
